summary: Due to repeated failures to retrieve any web pages or search results in this environment, I could not confirm or refute the claim that Paige Ostroushko was arrested for assaulting reporter Savanah Hernandez during an anti-ICE protest. I found no accessible records, news coverage, or official documents referencing this incident or the named individual. The absence of evidence here reflects technical access limitations rather than a definitive disproof. Independent verification would require direct access to the original @savsays post, local news archives for the relevant city and date, and police/court records (e.g., arrest logs, charging documents).
key_finding: No corroborating primary or secondary sources were accessible; the claim remains unverified in this session.
